title: Browse Device Translation Table
text: Browse Device Translation Table Displays a list of device translation tables that match the retrieve profile. How to Select a device translation table from the list and click OK . Related Links Device Translation Tables Device translation tables handle output to screens and printers. They map Uniface logical functions onto device functions, making it possible for Uniface to support a wide variety of hardware platforms, including their output devices. Device Translation Tables for Printing Printer device tables are a collection of sequences (control codes) associated with specific logical functions (such as bold, form feed, and init). The sequences begin with the escape character and are referred to as escape sequences. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
